# Data Is Plural

## 2025.01.08 edition

Traffic crashes. [Download CSV](https://example.com/crashes.csv). Citywide crash records with road type, severity, and weather conditions. As seen in: [Metro analysis](https://example.com/metro-analysis)

School lunches. [Nutrition JSON](https://example.com/lunches.json). Weekly school meal menus and nutrition data across the district.

This issue was brought to you by curious people and open data.
